title: geranium viscosissimum subsp. nervosum
intro: Geranium viscosissimum subsp. nervosum, also known as Nervous Sticky Geranium, is a plant species within the Geranium genus, characterized by its unique sticky leaves and stems. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Geranium viscosissimum subsp. nervosum include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress, and its potential to aid in wound healing and skin regeneration. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
